message:
fix(test): clear mock pollution before tool-registry tests

Add mock.restore() and restoreToolRegistryService() at the start of
tool-registry.service.test.ts to clear any mocks from prior test files
(e.g., setup-readiness.test.ts) before setting up fs mocks.

This fixes test failures where registry.source was "test-harness"
instead of "acfs" due to Bun's mock.module persisting across files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
